blocks.content: October. The homecoming banner went up on the gym doors on a Monday morning, orange and white, slightly crooked on the left side.
He said it at lunch like it had already been decided.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Revise your plan. Savannah's coming, Marcus is coming, and I'm currently unattached and refuse to go alone.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I could. Or the group could go together and I could spend the night being charming to multiple people at once. I prefer the second option. Kit. You're going.
Kit looked at Daisy across the table. She raised an eyebrow.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Good. Dress like you made an effort. Not a suit. Just — effort.
